subject: Add Biology page with cross-species gene-density table
body:
Three paragraphs covering insertional mutagenesis, the saturation
curve, and the C-value paradox; plus a 10-species reference table
spanning the densest (Carsonella ruddii, ~1,140 genes/Mb) and
sparsest (Paris japonica, Protopterus aethiopicus, < 0.3 genes/Mb)
known cellular genomes. Nav threaded into all four pages.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
author: Sean Walsh

subject: Add Checkpoints page with build-time git log snapshot
body:
- checkpoints.html lists commits sourced from commits.json
- build-commits.py regenerates commits.json from `git log` so the
  page works without GitHub API access (repo is private)
- Add Checkpoints link to nav on simulation and explainer pages

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
author: Sean Walsh

subject: Add top nav, custom species dropdown, dev serve script
body:
- Unified top navigation bar across simulation and explainer pages
- Replace native <select> with a custom dropdown so each species
  name renders in its accent colour (Safari/macOS ignore option
  colours on native selects)
- Add serve.sh for local development on http://localhost:8000

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
author: Sean Walsh
